programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E13
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E13

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson is on assignment to locate narcotics hidden below the waterline of vessels in the harbor

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike takes part in a daring rescue mission of a woman held prisoner by foreign forces

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Lt Wilson a young inexperienced fighter pilot is so eager to get his first kill and fit in with his flying mates that he manages to shoot up Gallaghers plane while chasing an enemy fighter Gallagher is willing to chalk it up to youthful exuberance and let the matter drop but Sandy takes it personally and makes Wilsons life miserable To make up for it Wilson volunteers for a dangerous mission and ends up saving Gallaghers life at great peril to his own This makes him an instant hero especially in Sandys eyes It also leaves him craving even more attention but at what risk

programme.title: Dark 307
programme.desc: Dark 307

programme.title: Dark 390
programme.desc: Dark 390

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark 393
programme.desc: Dark 393

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A parole officer is Nicks prime suspect in a murder investigation until the suspect nearly becomes the next victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out 4175 in coins Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke Slater wins amateur comedy night at the Jade Club Dukes act is impressions with his feature on Sgt Carter the best part of his act Against all common sense and his friends advice Gomer invites Carter to Dukes encore performance

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa Luke and Kate spend the weekend at a posh hotel in Los Angeles while there to attend the Sons of the Mystic Nile convention

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke is highly resistant to the idea of taking tall and awkward Agnes Maypole to a school party but when Grandpa finds the girl to be kind and considerate he becomes equally determined to compel the boy to honor his commitment to go ahead with the date

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS impersonators are running around causing chaos in CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 go to a South American country dressed as flamenco dancers to save the President of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13 but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker and the Crew scheme to get McHale chosen for a War Bond tour of The States but when they find out that they wont be included they must cook up another plan to get McHale off the hook

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber has been selling Fujis Polynesian dishes to the Taratupa personnel and trouble develops when Binghamton - Having sampled the delicious food - Insists that it be served at a dinner for a visiting Admiral

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Hercules 217
programme.desc: Hercules 217

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid races against the clock to find Zoor who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing gifts the chance to make things right to three criminals who break out of Houma Prison

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While unconscious and connected to an experimental brain machine Koenig dreams that he and his friends are on the way home Upon awakening everyone appears to be hideous monsters

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.desc: Keller goes undercover as a USAF officer to investigate a womans murder that might involve a USAF Colonel

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Barney are sent to investigate the case of a scientist who believes her dead husbands ghost is giving her orders on how to complete her important work

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble saves his boss life garnering the ranch owners powerful protection but Kimble doesnt want his favors because the owners a hit-man gone legit With Lt Gerard closing in the wealthy retired assassin sends the detective in the opposite direction from the fugitive into a trap where Gerard will be taken off the hunt for good

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While in Mexico tending to a Barkley mine Heath aids a Mexican General an old family friend who escapes the wrath of an oppressive leader When it is found out that the General is living in California at the Barkley Ranch Heath is jailed - and his life is used to bargain for the Generals return

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Noah Ali

Sergey Klyuev Rubenilton Pereira v. Rinat Sayakbaev Busurmankul Abdibait v. Maxim Divnich Bair Shtepin v. Heliton dos Santos Davila Khadis Ibragimov v. Stephan Puetz Valery Myasnikov v. Joseph Henle Movsar Evloev v. Sergey Morozov Damir Ismagulov v. Raul Tutarauli

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Answering a plea for help in fighting Monster Minds the Lightning League heads for the planet Argus Four along with an arrogant loner Aragon Aragon full of anger and pain is out to destroy Saw Boss and the Monster Minds no matter what the cost

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When a experiment to create a plant that would put a end to starvation once and for all goes wrong the scientist Audric accidentally creates mutated plants called The Monsters Mind Setting out to find his father Audrics son Jayce joined by 1000-year old wizard Gillian Jayces sister Flora Oon Audrics loyal robot and cocky hired mercenary Herc Stormsailor Jayce begins the search for Audric and begin the battle against The Monster Minds led by Sawboss Jayce and his companions become a team of fighters known as The Lightnining League and the adventure begins

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: In 1878 Jesse James robbed a gold shipment from Wells Fargo and hid it somewhere in Carlsbad Caverns New Mexico VENOM has discovered the clues leading them to the treasure but MASK is hot on their heels

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
